items.title: Cutting Civil Servants’ Salaries ‘Absolute Last Resort’: PM’s Economic Adviser
items.summary: PM's economic adviser Nurhisham Hussein says cutting civil servants' salaries is an "absolute last resort", which Putrajaya doesn't want to do, adding that health spending cuts are targeted because of MOH's big budget that expanded in the last three years. The post Cutting Civil Servants’ Salaries ‘Absolute Last Resort’: PM’s Economic Adviser appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Farmers Expected To Miss Planting Amid Fertiliser Shortages: PM’s Economic Adviser
items.summary: PM's economic adviser Nurhisham Hussein says farmers in Malaysia will likely miss planting towards the end of the year due to global fertiliser shortages. He adds that 90% of Malaysia's fertiliser use goes to palm oil, with only 10% for food crops. The post Farmers Expected To Miss Planting Amid Fertiliser Shortages: PM’s Economic Adviser appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Nothing In Public Health Care System Is A ‘Luxury’: KJ
items.summary: Khairy Jamaluddin says any amount of spending cuts will affect core services in the already underfunded public health care system, saying nothing in MOH is a "luxury" or an “add-on” that can be cut. "Every single sen taken away will affect the ministry." The post Nothing In Public Health Care System Is A ‘Luxury’: KJ appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: UPM Pioneers New Fish Surgery Technique In Malaysia
items.summary: UPM has pioneered a new fish surgery technique based on a recirculating anaesthesia system, the first of its kind in Malaysia. The Fish Anaesthetic Delivery System allows surgery to be performed outside of water without disrupting the fish's oxygen supply. The post UPM Pioneers New Fish Surgery Technique In Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Health DG’s Circular Welcome Breather For Housemen — Dr Ghazali Ahmad
items.summary: DG Mahathar's new circular, which limits housemen's working hours, is good for junior doctors. MOH should adopt a "Doctors Come First" motto to ensure staff retention. There will always be patients, but without doctors, waiting times will remain long. The post Health DG’s Circular Welcome Breather For Housemen — Dr Ghazali Ahmad appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Eight in 10 Malaysians Unaware Of Sight‑Threatening Retinal Diseases, Survey Finds
items.summary: As Malaysia moves towards becoming an aged nation, with NCDs such as diabetes continuing to affect many Malaysians, preserving functional independence must be an important public health priority. The post Eight in 10 Malaysians Unaware Of Sight‑Threatening Retinal Diseases, Survey Finds appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Three-Phase Rescue: Saving Malaysia’s Health Care System Before The Flatline — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam
items.summary: Malaysia’s two-tiered health care system has deep roots in more than three decades of service, but it must now prove its flexibility. The post Three-Phase Rescue: Saving Malaysia’s Health Care System Before The Flatline — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Phase Out Parallel Pathway Programmes After UK’s Pivot
items.summary: With RCSEd now calling the cardiothoracic surgery parallel pathway a "Malaysian qualification", after the UK's new law, Malaysia should start phasing out the parallel pathway. Expand local Master's clinical programmes to private universities and hospitals. The post Phase Out Parallel Pathway Programmes After UK’s Pivot appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Private Dental Practitioners Facing Growing Financial, Professional Pressure — MPDPA
items.summary: Young dentists today are facing mounting challenges including income instability, rising rental and staffing costs, increasing prices of dental materials and equipment, and competitive fees undercutting within dense markets. The post Private Dental Practitioners Facing Growing Financial, Professional Pressure — MPDPA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: What Comes After The Crash: Be Aware Of The Head Injury You Cannot See
items.summary: Road accident-related head injuries may unfold beyond the crash itself, with delayed symptoms and internal complications that are not always visible at the scene. The post What Comes After The Crash: Be Aware Of The Head Injury You Cannot See appeared first on CodeBlue .
